mapper.select: select user_id as userId, account as userAccount, game_level as gameLevel from t_user_info where invite_user_code = #{inviteUserCode} order by user_id desc
SELECT b.distance, a.* FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.par_user_id AND b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 ORDER BY b.distance ASC

SELECT a.user_id as userId, a.is_valid as isValid, a.min_game_level as minGameLevel, a.game_level as gameLevel FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.par_user_id AND b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 ORDER BY b.distance ASC

SELECT a.user_id as userId, a.is_valid as isValid, a.min_game_level as minGameLevel, a.game_level as gameLevel FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.par_user_id WHERE b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 AND a.is_valid = 1 ORDER BY b.distance ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT b.par_user_id FROM t_user_relation b where b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0

SELECT b.distance as distance, a.user_id as userId, a.is_valid as isValid, a.game_level as gameLevel, a.min_game_level as minGameLevel, a.valid_sub_num as validSubNum FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.par_user_id AND b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 ORDER BY b.distance ASC
SELECT a.* FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.pos_user_id AND b.active_flag = 1 AND b.par_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 ORDER BY b.distance ASC

SELECT a.* FROM t_user_info a INNER JOIN t_user_relation b ON a.user_id = b.pos_user_id and a.deleted = 0 AND b.active_flag = 1 AND b.par_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance > 0 AND b.distance <= 5 ORDER BY b.distance ASC
SELECT b.par_user_id FROM t_user_relation b where b.active_flag = 1 AND b.pos_user_id = #{userId} AND b.distance <= #{distance} ORDER BY b.distance ASC
SELECT b.pos_user_id FROM t_user_relation b where b.active_flag = 1 AND b.par_user_id =#{userId} AND b.distance >0
select a.user_id as userId, a.create_time as createTime from t_user_info a inner join t_user_relation b on a.user_id = b.pos_user_id and b.par_user_id = #{topUserId} and b.distance > 0

SELECT user_id as userId, game_level as gameLevel, valid_sub_num as validSubNum, valid_umbrella_num as validUmbrellaNum FROM t_user_info
user_id IN
#{userId}
order by user_id desc
select user_id from t_user_info where partner_status = 1 and is_valid = 1
SELECT user_id FROM t_user_info WHERE GREATEST(game_level, min_game_level) = #{level} and is_valid = 1
SELECT count(1) AS hasServiceCenter FROM t_user_info WHERE has_service_center = 1;
select user_id as userId, performance as computingPower from t_user_info
select user_id as userId, GREATEST(game_level, min_game_level) as level from t_user_info where game_level > 0 or min_game_level > 0
select wallet_address, parent_wallet_address from bms_user order by user_id asc
